title: Facilities Engineer
description:
Job Descriptions

  1. Plan, execute and supervise all Facilities maintenance related work services.
  2. Manage Building / Facilities / M&E works and services for effective and efficient operations facilities performance.
  3. Coordinate and supervise the M&E installation and maintenance work if needed.
  4. Working closely with the client, sub-contractors, and the facilities team to resolve any technical issues. Attend M&E related meetings and involve in the preparation of related reports.
  5. Assist in planning, controlling and coordinating of mechanical, electrical works.
  6. Schedule, monitor and supervise the progress of works .
  7. Prepare and follow- up closely on the client inquiries and quotations.
  8. Follow the company internal work processes and documentation.
  9. Build and maintain good client relationships and uphold high quality standards.

Job Requirements

  1. Minimum Diploma or Degree in Engineering or Building / Real Estate/ Facilities Management or any related qualifications.
  2. Facilities Maintenance operations background with at least 3 years of experience will be an added advantage.

5.5 days work week.

postedCompany.description:
Kim Yew Integrated Pte Ltd (Previously known as Kim Yew Electrical & Sanitary Pte Ltd) was established in Year 1985 as a sub-contractor under-taking electrical and plumbing works. Over the years, the company has grown by building on its core strengths. The company was then incorporated in Singapore into a private limited company in year 1996. Since then it has emerged as an established integrated facilities management service provider offering various types of professional services including facilities management, maintenance of building facilities, consultancy services, etc.

 

The company had also worked with several building contractors for A&A projects at various locations throughout Singapore. Such projects include areas from the commercial, government and institutional sectors. We have strong working relationships with our partners and specialists as we believed in teamwork, cooperation and unity.

 

We support the green movement and other energy conservation initiatives. We worked in collaboration with ESCOs to improve energy conservation efforts for clients. We are ISO 9001:2008 and ISO 18001:2000 certified.
postedCompany.name: KIM YEW INTEGRATED PTE. LTD.
